summary: Iteration 115: Complete testing of payment_calculator.py service and scadenze_pagamento features. All 16 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: PaymentScheduleSection component renders correctly with 'Ricalcola da Anagrafica' button (data-testid: btn-recalc-from-anagrafica), Edit mode allows adding/modifying rate, Save button (data-testid: btn-save-scadenze) saves changes with toast confirmation.

a_vista.result: PASS - Returns same date as invoice_date

60gg_dffm.result: PASS - Returns end of month after 60 days (2026-01-15 → 2026-03-31)

2_rate_split.result: PASS - Returns 2 rate with correct dates and amounts

with_payment_type.result: PASS - Correctly looks up payment type and calculates scadenze

recalc_scadenze_bulk.result: PASS - Returns {linked: N, updated: M} counts

recalc_single_with_supplier.result: PASS - Recalculates from supplier payment terms

update_mark_pagata.result: PASS - Correctly saves pagata flag on individual rate

shows_individual_rate.test: Dashboard shows individual rate with rata numbers
shows_individual_rate.result: PASS - 3 rate invoice shows 3 entries with 'Rata 1/2/3' in titles

excludes_paid_rate.test: Dashboard excludes rate marked as pagata
excludes_paid_rate.result: PASS - Paid rate correctly excluded from list

edit_mode_flow.details: Click Modifica → Add rata → Fill date/amount → Click Salva → Toast 'Piano scadenze aggiornato'

test_credentials: Created test user/session for UI testing, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices, suppliers, payment_types for testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment calculator service (payment_calculator.py) is fully functional. Key features: (1) calculate_due_dates handles A Vista, DF, DFFM, FM+N, multi-rate splits, (2) calc_scadenze_from_supplier looks up payment_type from clients collection and calculates, (3) scadenze_pagamento array stored on fatture_ricevute documents, (4) Dashboard endpoint iterates over scadenze_pagamento for individual installment entries, (5) PaymentScheduleSection component in FattureRicevutePage.js provides edit/recalculate UI.
